text: As artificial intelligence becomes more common, we must think carefully about ethics. One major concern is bias—AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination against certain groups. To ensure fairness, developers must check their data and algorithms. Privacy is also crucial; people should know how their information is used. Transparency means companies should explain how AI makes decisions. Finally, responsible AI development requires ongoing testing and collaboration to prevent harm. By focusing on these values, we can build technology that benefits everyone fairly and safely.
